text: The output defines a single skill, not a skill group or orchestrator-worker system.
evidence_required: SKILL.md or file tree shows one skill only.

text: The skill includes explicit input and output format requirements.
evidence_required: SKILL.md contains input and output sections or equivalent instructions.

text: The skill proposes at least two realistic eval prompts.
evidence_required: Eval prompts are present and match the meeting-notes workflow.
